title: Hapbeat Firmware Manifest Fragment (per-release)
description: Per-release fragment published by a single firmware repo as a Release asset (manifest.fragment.json) and/or fenced JSON in the Release body. The aggregator / Cloudflare Function merges fragments across repos+releases into the unified manifest (firmware-manifest.schema.json). A fragment describes ONE release of ONE repo, so it carries `tag` and may list multiple envs/variants built at that tag. See specs/firmware-distribution.md (DEC-035).

schema_version.description: Fragment schema version emitted by the firmware repo (2 or 3).

tag.description: Namespaced release tag this fragment was built at: <repoShort>/<env>/vX.Y.Z.

envs.description: Legacy v1 shape — env list. New repos emit `variants`.

filename.description: Release-asset filename (relative). The aggregator/Function rewrites this to a reachable path.

contentHash.description: sha256 of the published bytes (app-only for appOta; full image for serial-only envs).

fwVersion.description: Bare semver baked into this build (no leading 'v'; dev builds carry dN).

buildCommit.description: Source commit sha (audit). Mapped to `buildSha` in the aggregated manifest.
